vocab.meaning: một dải nhìn bao quát không bị che chắn
vocab.example: From the penthouse, we had an uninterrupted sweep of the coastline that was truly captivating.

vocab.meaning: vách đá dốc đứng đầy ấn tượng
vocab.example: The hotel was perched on a dramatic escarpment, offering a vertical view down into the canyon.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thanh khiết, siêu thực (như cõi tiên)
vocab.example: The sun rising over the salt flats created a scene of ethereal beauty that felt like another planet.

vocab.meaning: toàn cảnh hùng vĩ, ngoạn mục
vocab.example: After a grueling five-hour hike, the spectacular panorama from the summit made every step worth it.

vocab.meaning: cảnh quan thành phố mang vẻ cổ kính, độc đáo
vocab.example: I fell in love with the quaint cityscape of Prague, with its red rooftops and gothic spires.
At midnight, the moon turned the ocean into a glimmering expanse of silver and black.
Looking out from the small plane, I was overwhelmed by the vast wilderness of the Amazon rainforest.

vocab.meaning: những ngọn đồi nhấp nhô, lượn sóng
vocab.example: The view consisted of undulating hills covered in vineyards as far as the eye could see.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh tuyệt mỹ, cao cả
vocab.example: The Norwegian fjords offer some of the most sublime scenery on the face of the Earth.

vocab.meaning: vị trí đắc địa (có tầm nhìn bao quát toàn bộ bên dưới)
vocab.example: The castle was built in a commanding position, providing the royals with a strategic view of the entire valley.
